transcript.text: of the foundation because this truly is the foundation.
For every single new client that we add,
we're going to take these three steps in this order.
So the first thing that we do for everyone
is audit their Google business profile,
make sure their categories and services are correct,
make sure every box is filled out that should be.
Just really basic, make sure their GVP
is set up appropriately.
The next step that we do is the GVP landing page audit.
We just wanna make sure that the GVP landing page
is set up as well as it can be.
We don't have a single prompt for writing content
for the GVP landing page because what we're writing
is going to be based on what they currently have
and how they're currently ranking.
We typically don't wanna delete everything
on a GVP landing page and start over.
We're going to take what they have and add to it.
And the third step for every one of our new clients
is that we're going to set up the GVP management software.
That's going to keep the GVP active with posts,
with photos, with videos, anything like that that we have
is going to keep the GVP active
with putting new things out consistently.
Those three very simple steps and for a new client,
we can get this set up in under an hour total.
But these three things are going to be enough
for some clients that they don't honestly need anything else.
Now, for the clients that do need the additional core 30 work,
these three steps will almost always still result
an improved rank position.
That's why we start these foundations
with every single new client.
It's going to help them.
It helps us with the core 30.
It makes sure the websites are set up appropriately.
And like I said, for some clients, it's honestly all we need.
So start here.
This is what you wanna make sure is complete,
whether it's your business or your client's business.
